steps.title: Use the future-growth clue
steps.content: The phrase about expecting continued growth shows that analysts are making a statement about what revenues will do by 2028. The blank needs a verb for forecasting.

steps.title: Select a forecasting verb
steps.content: A would mean the analysts caused or made the revenues, B contradicts the expectation of growth, and C adds concern that the text does not suggest. The matching verb means forecasted a future outcome. The answer is D.
